violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Wal-Mart shopping bags were being used for food storage in the prep cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. Witnessed kitchen employee just rinse a pair of tongues and knife used for prepping food, and not wash rinse and sanitize.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the microwave needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood and filters need to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. No splash bleach was being used to sanitize dishes. This is not an approved sanitizer and must use only regular unscented bleach.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors under in the basement stock area needs to be cleaned.

Removal frequency of refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Refuse, recyclables, and returnables were not removed from the premises at a frequency to minimize odors and conditions that attract insects and rodents. Numerous empty cardboard boxes were stored in the basement storage area. These need to be removed frequently enough to prevent their accumulation.

General premises. — --Food establishment and all parts of the property in connection with their operation were not kept free from litter. The basement storage is not orderly and has numerous storage containers. Area of the basement could be or be accessed during the inspection to check storage and pest control.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly trap was hung from the storage shelves by the microwave and over the rice cookers up front. These must not be placed over these areas.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
